facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Dallas
opportunity_summary: Vapor IO VEM20 micro modular edge DCs at cell tower sites. 2x 10kW racks per module. 90-day deployment. Currently air-cooled but blindmate cooling plant supports liquid retrofit. 36+ US cities.
notes: Live deployment. VEM20 form factor. Potential liquid cooling retrofit as density increases. Schneider Electric partner.

facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Chicago
opportunity_summary: First live Kinetic Edge site in Chicago. VEM20 modules at tower base. Blindmate cooling accepts chilled water, DX, or adiabatic — liquid cooling candidate.
notes: One of 6 live markets. First 2 live sites in Chicago announced early 2024.

facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Atlanta
opportunity_summary: Live Kinetic Edge market. VEM20 edge modules. Blindmate cooling plant supports liquid cooling swap-in. Hot climate = strong Solar Steam fit.
notes: One of 6 operational Vapor IO markets.

facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Las Vegas
opportunity_summary: Live Kinetic Edge in extreme desert heat. VEM20 micro modular. Blindmate cooling supports liquid. High solar insolation = excellent Solar Steam location.
notes: Desert climate ideal for solar steam. One of 6 live Vapor IO markets.

facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Phoenix
opportunity_summary: Live Kinetic Edge in extreme heat Phoenix market. VEM20 modules. Ideal Solar Steam location — highest US cooling demand.
notes: One of 6 live Vapor IO markets. Phoenix is top US data center market.

facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Pittsburgh
opportunity_summary: Live Kinetic Edge market. VEM20 micro modular edge DC. Blindmate cooling supports multiple technologies including liquid.
notes: One of 6 live Vapor IO markets.

facility_name: Vapor IO — Kinetic Edge Barcelona (Cellnex Partnership)
opportunity_summary: First European Vapor IO deployment via Cellnex tower infrastructure. Barcelona cell tower base sites. Edge grid of micro modular DCs across European telco sites.
notes: Partnership with Cellnex (Europe's largest tower operator). Expansion signal for European edge liquid cooling market.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Austin Edge DC
opportunity_summary: EdgeMicro containerized 6-rack micro DC at cell tower base. 48kW IT capacity. Schneider Electric manufacturing partner. Hot Texas climate = strong cooling need.
notes: One of first 3 EdgeMicro sites. Factory-built containerized edge colo.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Raleigh Edge DC
opportunity_summary: EdgeMicro containerized micro DC at tower base. 48kW, 6 racks. Schneider partner. Growing Research Triangle market.
notes: One of first 3 EdgeMicro sites.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Tampa Edge DC
opportunity_summary: EdgeMicro containerized micro DC. 48kW, 6 racks. Hot Florida climate demands efficient cooling. Solar Steam opportunity.
notes: One of first 3 EdgeMicro sites.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Cleveland Edge DC
opportunity_summary: Phase 2 EdgeMicro expansion into underserved Midwest tier-2 markets. Containerized 48kW edge colo.
notes: Planned Q4 2024 launch per June 2024 announcement.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Indianapolis Edge DC
opportunity_summary: Phase 2 EdgeMicro expansion. Underserved Midwest market. 48kW containerized edge DC.
notes: Planned Q4 2024 launch.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Memphis Edge DC
opportunity_summary: Phase 2 EdgeMicro expansion. Southern underserved market. Hot climate = strong cooling demand.
notes: Planned Q4 2024 launch.

facility_name: EdgeMicro — Houston Edge DC
opportunity_summary: Phase 2 EdgeMicro expansion. Major Texas metro. Extreme heat and humidity = highest cooling demand. Solar Steam ideal.
notes: Planned Q4 2024 launch.

facility_name: DartPoints / TMGcore — Edgebox Immersion Cooling Portfolio (11 Sites)
opportunity_summary: DartPoints deployed 11 TMGcore Edgebox immersion-cooled units across its edge colo portfolio. Two-phase liquid immersion. Southwest, Southeast, Midwest, Mid-Atlantic regions. PUE ~1.028.
notes: 11 Edgebox units deployed. DartPoints HQ in Austin TX. Regional focus: SW, SE, Upper Midwest, Mid-Atlantic. TMGcore Edgebox 30kW per unit, 16 sq ft footprint.

facility_name: TMGcore OTTO Edgebox — Naval Postgraduate School (NPS)
opportunity_summary: TMGcore OTTO Edgebox deployed at Naval Postgraduate School main data center. Two-phase liquid immersion cooling. Defense/military edge use case. PUE 1.028.
notes: LP-CRADA since Aug 2021, extended multiple times through 2022+. MOVES Institute collaboration. Navy/DOD applications.

facility_name: GRC ICEtank — Hill Air Force Base (C3 One)
operator_company: Green Revolution Cooling / US Air Force
opportunity_summary: GRC containerized immersion-cooled DC at Hill AFB near Salt Lake City. C3 One variant with cooling tower heat rejection. 100% uptime over 3-year test. 41.4% total power reduction. Deployable in <24 hours.
notes: 2-4 racks per container. ElectroSafe coolant. USAF AFWERX program. Already captured in pipeline file — included here for edge/modular context.

facility_name: GRC ICEtank — Tinker Air Force Base (C3 Two)
operator_company: Green Revolution Cooling / US Air Force
opportunity_summary: GRC containerized immersion-cooled DC at Tinker AFB OKC. C3 Two variant with dry cooler heat rejection. 93.1% PUE reduction. Military-grade turnkey modular.
notes: Dry cooler variant. Oklahoma heat = Solar Steam opportunity. Already in pipeline file.

facility_name: GRC ICEraQ Nano — Edge Immersion Cooling Platform
opportunity_summary: GRC ICEraQ Nano launched Nov 2025. 10U immersion rack for edge deployments — data rooms, comms closets. 13kW cooling, no chilled water needed. Purpose-built for edge. Deployed in 24 countries.
notes: Product announcement, not site-specific deployment. GRC HQ in Austin TX. Represents edge liquid cooling product trend.

facility_name: GRC / DCV / Dell — Middle East Immersion-Cooled Modular DCs
opportunity_summary: GRC + DCV Industries + Dell collaboration for immersion-cooled containerized DCs in Middle East. DCV QUBE modular with GRC cooling + Dell servers. 50% cooling energy reduction vs air. Extreme Gulf heat = top Solar Steam region.
notes: Oct 2023 announcement. Plug-and-play modular. Gulf region harsh environment. Exact deployment sites TBD.

facility_name: Nautilus Data Technologies — Stockton1 Floating DC
opportunity_summary: World's first floating data center. 7MW on barge at Port of Stockton on San Joaquin River. Patented natural water cooling — no chillers, no cooling towers, zero water consumption. PUE 1.15. 55kW+ per rack. Backblaze is anchor tenant.
notes: Barge Eli M. 10,000 sq ft. 6.5MW across 4 vaults. DHS Tier-1 security. Port location.

facility_name: Nautilus Data Technologies — Los Angeles Floating DC
opportunity_summary: Nautilus expansion to LA port facility. 7.5MW floating DC on custom barge. Natural water cooling, zero water use. Southern California solar insolation ideal for Solar Steam pairing.
notes: Power agreements and water assessments in place. Adjacent shore support infrastructure.

facility_name: Nautilus Data Technologies — Marseille Floating DC
opportunity_summary: Nautilus European expansion. 7.5MW floating DC in Marseille port. Mediterranean coast, <3km from cable landing station. 14 subsea cables. Zero-water natural cooling. Southern France solar ideal for Solar Steam.
notes: DE-CIX presence boosts connectivity. Mediterranean climate = high solar.

facility_name: Nautilus Data Technologies — Limerick Floating DC
opportunity_summary: EUR 35M floating DC on River Shannon at James Casey Walk. Europe's first water-cooled DC. Zero-water closed-loop cooling, no chemical refrigerants. 125 jobs. Historic clock tower preservation.
notes: Former electrical substation site. Construction underway, operational within 18 months of announcement.

facility_name: NETMOUNTAINS VEL2 — Velbert (Rittal/GF Direct Liquid Cooling)
cooling_type: liquid (direct-to-chip, Rittal CDU + GF polymer piping)
opportunity_summary: NETMOUNTAINS co-location DC in Velbert, Germany. Rittal + GF chiller-to-chip liquid cooling. 1MW CDU in rack format. 66kW/rack density. 100 racks Phase 1. First commercial deployment of Rittal modular DLC infrastructure.
notes: Former brewery equipment facility retrofit. VEL1=air, VEL2=direct liquid cooled. Industriestrasse 76. Rittal is system integrator. FWS+TCS cooling loops.

facility_name: Compass Datacenters — Grand Prairie Campus (Schneider EcoStruxure Pod)
cooling_type: liquid (technical water loop for DLC, RDHX, InRow)
opportunity_summary: 768-acre campus, 24 buildings across 3 phases. Schneider EcoStruxure prefab pods with integrated liquid cooling water loop. First building energized May 2026. Modular pod architecture supports 1MW+ per pod. Texas heat = Solar Steam opportunity.
notes: First EcoStruxure pods deployed at Compass campus fall 2025. Joint engineering. Motivair liquid cooling components. Just outside Grand Prairie TX.

facility_name: ResetData — 151 Clarence Street Sydney (Immersion Lab)
opportunity_summary: ResetData liquid-cooled DC lab in Sydney CBD office building basement. 2x 100kW Submer immersion pods. 18kW/sqm density. APAC's first full-stack AI/ML immersion-cooled test facility. 45% CO2 reduction, 40% cooling cost reduction.
notes: 151 Clarence Street, Investa building. Dell servers, Intel chips. Partners: Castrol BP, Submer, Siemon, Macquarie Data Centres.

facility_name: Sonic Edge — Castrol Berkshire R&D Immersion Pod
opportunity_summary: Sonic Edge delivered 100kW MegaPod with Submer immersion tanks to Castrol Berkshire R&D site. Modular prefab DC — fully commissioned, operational in hours. Edge/on-premise HPC workloads. 50-100kW capacity range.
notes: UK-based Sonic Edge founded 2020. DX, chilled water, or immersion cooling options. Castrol provides dielectric fluids for immersion.

facility_name: Dell Micro 815 — Modular Data Center (DLC/Immersion)
opportunity_summary: Dell Micro 815 MDC: 1-3 racks to extreme edge. Direct liquid cooling AND immersion options. -40C to 50C operating range. Pre-fabricated, deploys in weeks. Military, industrial, 5G use cases. PowerEdge XE9640 with H100 GPUs.
notes: Round Rock TX = Dell HQ (product reference, not single deployment site). Supports plate and immersion cooling. Extreme environment rated.

facility_name: Dell PowerEdge XR9700 — Ruggedized Liquid-Cooled Edge Server
opportunity_summary: Ruggedized closed-loop liquid-cooled server for utility poles, rooftops, building exteriors. Cloud RAN + edge AI workloads. Extends x86 compute beyond DC walls. Unprotected outdoor environment rated.
notes: Product platform, not single site. Key for telecom/5G edge liquid cooling trend. Represents smallest form factor liquid cooling.

facility_name: LiquidStack MicroModular — Edge Immersion Cooling Platform
opportunity_summary: LiquidStack MicroModular: 250kW turnkey immersion-cooled edge DC in small container. Single 48U DataTank. PUE 1.02. Ruggedized for harsh environments. Deploys in weeks. Trane Technologies acquired LiquidStack Feb 2026.
notes: San Jose HQ. MicroModular for local edge, MegaModular (1.5MW, 6 DataTanks) for regional edge. Trane acquisition strengthens global reach.

facility_name: LiquidStack MegaModular — Regional Edge Immersion Cooling
opportunity_summary: LiquidStack MegaModular: up to 1.5MW with 6x 48U DataTanks. Full modular container. PUE 1.02. Turnkey for telco, colo, HPC, hybrid cloud. Trane Technologies acquisition (Feb 2026) adds global manufacturing + distribution.
notes: GigaModular CDUs (2.5-10MW) also available. 25% lower capex than traditional CDUs.

facility_name: Submer MicroPod — Edge DC-in-a-Box Platform
opportunity_summary: Submer MicroPod: edge DC-in-a-box. Up to 7kW with integrated secondary cooling. Deployable anywhere — warehouses, offices, remote/harsh climate. Telecom, streaming, cloud. 400MW+ total Submer deployments worldwide.
notes: Barcelona HQ. MicroPod is smallest unit. Also MegaPod (used at Castrol/Sonic Edge). 400MW+ cumulative deployments by early 2025.

facility_name: Microsoft Quincy — Wiwynn Two-Phase Immersion Cooling
opportunity_summary: First cloud provider running two-phase immersion in production. April 2021 deployment. Wiwynn servers in 3M engineered fluid (boiling point 122F). 5-15% server power reduction. Hyperscale pilot validating immersion for edge/modular scale-down.
notes: Quincy WA datacenter campus. Proof-of-concept for immersion at scale. Informs edge liquid cooling product development.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Amarillo TX (EDC 1)
opportunity_summary: Duos Edge AI modular edge DC at Potter County adjacent to largest TX Panhandle colo. Carrier-neutral, SOC 2 compliant. 100kW/rack capacity. 90-day deployment. AIRSYS precision cooling. Texas heat = high cooling demand.
notes: 2 EDCs in Amarillo market as of Mar 2026. Rapid Texas expansion: also Lubbock, Waco, Victoria, Abilene, Corpus Christi.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Amarillo TX (EDC 2)
opportunity_summary: Second Duos EDC in Amarillo. Mar 19 2026 deployment. High-density low-latency AI computing. Modular rapid deployment (90 days). Strong Solar Steam candidate in Texas Panhandle.
notes: Deployed March 2026. Potter County. Expanding beyond TX.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Abilene TX
opportunity_summary: Duos Edge AI modular EDC in Abilene TX. Deployed Jan 7 2026. Carrier-neutral, real-time AI. 100kW/rack, 90-day deployment. West Texas solar ideal for Solar Steam.
notes: West Texas underserved market.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Lubbock TX
opportunity_summary: Duos Edge AI modular EDC in Lubbock TX. 2 EDCs for carrier-neutral needs. West Texas Panhandle market. High solar insolation for Solar Steam.
notes: 2 EDCs in Lubbock market per expansion announcement.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Waco TX
opportunity_summary: Duos Edge AI modular EDC in Waco TX. Central Texas market. 100kW/rack modular edge. Hot climate.
notes: Part of broader Texas expansion.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Corpus Christi TX
opportunity_summary: Duos Edge AI modular EDC in Corpus Christi. Gulf Coast Texas. Extreme heat and humidity = high cooling demand. Solar Steam ideal.
notes: Part of broader Texas expansion.

facility_name: Duos Edge AI — Victoria TX
opportunity_summary: Duos Edge AI modular EDC in Victoria TX. South Texas rural market. 100kW/rack, 90-day deployment. Solar Steam candidate.
notes: Part of broader Texas expansion.

facility_name: Kao Data KLON-03 — Harlow Liquid-Cooled AI DC
opportunity_summary: Kao Data KLON-03: 17.6MW liquid-cooled AI DC at Harlow campus. Hybrid cooling — direct-to-chip liquid + air in same Technology Suite. 130kW/rack. 100% renewable energy. Digital twins. Low-latency to London exchanges. Announced Mar 2025.
notes: Harlow UK, Greater London region. One of largest liquid-cooled allocations in London area.

facility_name: Aligned Data Centers — North Phoenix Advanced Cooling Lab
cooling_type: liquid (DeltaFlow — DLC, RDHX, immersion up to 300kW/rack)
opportunity_summary: Aligned's 1MW Advanced Cooling Lab at North Phoenix campus. DeltaFlow liquid cooling system — supports DLC, RDHX, immersion up to 300kW/rack. Modular AMI (Adaptive Modular Infrastructure) enables air-to-liquid transition without facility redesign. Desert heat = peak Solar Steam target.
notes: Aug 2025 opening. Partnership with DivCon Controls. Lab tests patented cooling tech for next-gen GPUs. 3 Phoenix-area campuses total.

facility_name: Aligned Data Centers — Glendale Campus (PHX-13)
opportunity_summary: Aligned Glendale campus: 100 acres, 4 planned facilities, first building 72MW. DeltaFlow liquid cooling integrated. Groundbreaking Apr 15 2025. Arizona desert = top Solar Steam market. Massive modular liquid-cooled capacity.
notes: Already in pipeline file for Aligned overall — included here for modular liquid cooling specificity.

facility_name: Valeo / 2CRSi — India Telecom Edge Immersion Cooling
opportunity_summary: Valeo + 2CRSi outdoor autonomous immersion-cooled edge DC for Indian telco operators. Water-free, suited for remote, dusty, humid 5G antenna sites. Manufacturing in India (Valeo Pune + Chennai plants). SOP November 2026. Huge Indian 5G edge market.
notes: Valeo applies automotive thermal expertise to DC cooling. India 5G expansion driving massive edge DC demand. Manufacturing localization key.

facility_name: Iceotope KUL RAN — Telco Edge Liquid Cooling (HPE/Intel)
opportunity_summary: Iceotope KUL RAN: precision liquid-cooled telco edge server. HPE ProLiant DL110 + Intel Xeon. 40% energy reduction vs air. Zero water. IP67-rated, NEBS certified. 'Fit and forget' design for cell sites. 30% less component failure. Telco-grade for 5G vRAN.
notes: Sheffield UK HQ. KUL EXTREME variant for ruggedized far-edge. Also KUL EDGE for enterprise. Partnerships: HPE, Intel, nVent, Engineered Fluids, Juniper.

facility_name: Flexnode — ARPA-E COOLERCHIPS Prefab Micro DC
cooling_type: liquid (hybrid immersion + microchannel heatsink, no primary loop)
opportunity_summary: DOE ARPA-E COOLERCHIPS program ($3.5M grant). Prefab modular liquid-cooled micro DC. Manifold microchannel heatsink + chassis hybrid immersion. No facility water supply needed — heat rejected directly to ambient. Only needs power + fiber. Revolutionary for off-grid edge.
notes: Bethesda MD HQ. UMD CALCE partnership. Already have LIC01 site in Long Island City (in existing dataset). Development stage — watch for commercial deployment.

facility_name: Zella DC — Petroecuador Remote Edge DCs (16 Units)
opportunity_summary: Petroecuador deployed 16 Zella Pro 25 micro DCs across Ecuador — remote, rugged, unmanned oil/gas locations. Dual precision cooling with external condenser. Extreme environment edge computing at scale.
notes: Quito used as reference city; actual units across multiple remote Ecuadorian locations. 10+ year track record. Zella DC HQ Perth, Australia.

facility_name: Zella DC — New York City Lab Deployment (3 Units)
opportunity_summary: 3 Zella Pro units in 2 NYC laboratories. Dual cooling + redundant power. Precision edge micro DC for lab/research environments.
notes: Reference deployment for healthcare/research edge micro DC use case.

facility_name: Infinium Edge — Sacramento (Immersion Cooling Platform Launch)
opportunity_summary: Infinium Edge launched Jan 15 2026. Immersion cooling platform using carbon-negative synthetic dielectric fluid produced at Infinium eFuel facilities. AI Factory modular pods. Unique value prop: immersion fluid from eFuel production = carbon-negative cooling.
notes: Sacramento CA base. Fuel-maker pivoting thermal management expertise to DC cooling. Modular AI factories offered. Already in pipeline file.

facility_name: Vertiv MegaMod HDX — Modular Liquid Cooling Infrastructure
opportunity_summary: Vertiv MegaMod HDX: prefab power + liquid cooling. Compact (13 racks, 1.25MW) and Combo (144 racks, 10MW) configs. DLC + air hybrid. 50-100kW+/rack. Available globally (NA + EMEA). Jan 2026 launch. Major modular liquid cooling platform.
notes: Columbus OH HQ. Also SmartMod Max CW (200kW chilled water). Global availability.

facility_name: Vertiv SmartMod Max CW — Prefab Modular DC (Chilled Water)
cooling_type: liquid (chilled water, up to 200kW IT load)
opportunity_summary: Vertiv SmartMod Max CW: chilled water prefab modular DC. 100-200kW IT load, up to 24 racks. Factory assembled/tested. Available NA. Water-based cooling = Solar Steam integration opportunity for thermal energy input.
notes: Two-module design. North America availability.

facility_name: Cannon Technologies T4 / Stulz — UK Government Transportable MDC
cooling_type: air (chiller-less, Wall-Air Evolution units, up to 200kW N+1)
opportunity_summary: Cannon T4 TMDC with Stulz Wall-Air Evolution cooling for UK government. Transportable, chiller-less. 15kW per unit, 200kW+ in N+1. Military/defense portable DC use case. Wall-Air units deployed worldwide.
notes: Fareham UK = Cannon Technologies HQ. Government client name undisclosed. Modular multi-module design. DX/chilled water options available but not liquid cooling for this client.

facility_name: Attom AgileMod — Claro Wireless Latin America
opportunity_summary: Attom AgileMod deployed for Claro Wireless rapid market expansion in Latin America. Modular prefab DC with containment cooling. Record deployment time. Attom also offers ByteCool D2C liquid cooling and OceanCool immersion — product line supports liquid upgrade.
notes: Sao Paulo used as reference city for Claro/LatAm. Attom product line includes AgileCore AI (liquid-cooled) modular DC.

facility_name: Attom AgileCore AI — Modular Liquid-Cooled AI DC
opportunity_summary: Attom AgileCore AI: purpose-built modular DC for AI/HPC. ByteCool D2C liquid cooling + OceanCool immersion options. CDU infrastructure integrated. Chinese manufacturer with global deployment track record (LatAm, Asia).
notes: Shenzhen HQ. Multiple product lines: AgileRax (rack micro DC), AgileCub (container), AgileMod (containment), AgileHub (shelter), AgileCore AI (liquid). Central Bank of LatAm customer.

facility_name: DataBank — Red Oak Campus (Liquid-Cooled Data Halls)
opportunity_summary: DataBank Red Oak campus: massive construction with 7 liquid-cooled data halls (revised from 9 as network needs shifted mid-deployment). Peak crew 4,000-5,000 by early 2026. Texas location = high cooling demand + Solar Steam target.
notes: Red Oak TX, south of Dallas. Customer requirements shifting between GPU compute and network capacity mid-build demonstrates liquid cooling demand volatility.
